repair_summary: Fixed self-consistent iteration to use correct update DeltaF = DeltaF_old + log(avg_R/avg_F) instead of DeltaF = -log(avg_F/avg_R). Corrected uncertainty computation to use consistent Fermi functions (same as iteration) by setting f_F and f_R directly using w_F - DeltaF - M and w_R + DeltaF - M.
covered_requirements: Must produce correct Delta_f and dDelta_f for given w_F and w_R.
Add a scaled executable test case that uses differently shaped work distributions and verifies the output format and approximate numerical accuracy.
Must produce output without raising an exception; output should display zero values.
